title: Vertex AI node fails with asyncIterator error
symptom: The workflow fails with an error message stating 'Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'Symbol(Symbol.asyncIterator)')' when the Postgres Chat Memory node is connected.
applies_when: Postgres Chat Memory node is connected
not_this_if: Vertex AI node works without Postgres Chat Memory node
root_cause: The error occurs because the Vertex AI node expects a stream of text tokens but receives an error object instead due to misconfiguration, such as a missing billing account. The node attempts to iterate over the error object, leading to the asyncIterator error.
fix_steps: Select the Google Cloud project by ID instead of from the list.
Ensure that a billing account is configured for the Google Cloud project.
agent_instruction: Select the Google Cloud project by ID and ensure billing is configured.
